schemalist.schema:
<<<<<<< HEAD
true Enable auto-hide Safety toggle. Turn off to always show panel.
0 Panel screen position
Position of the panel as a percentage of screen height (0 = top, 100 = bottom).
=======
0.2 Animation duration Time in seconds for panel show/hide animations.
'#000000' Panel background color Hex color string (#rrggbb) applied to the panel background.
0.0 Panel opacity when clear Panel opacity (0.0–1.0) when no window overlaps the panel area.
0.85 Panel opacity when overlapped Panel opacity (0.0–1.0) when a window is behind the panel area.
>>>>>>> origin/main
